servinfo.title: Drive Intermediate Shaft Disassembly and Reassembly

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Drive Intermediate Shaft Assembly Removal and Installation:Front

s1.ptxt: Remove circlip (1) from drive intermediate shaft.
Using hydraulic press (1), remove drive intermediate shaft (2) from intermediate shaft bearing.

attention4.ptxt: Bearing shield is pushed together with drive intermediate shaft out of support (3) by press. If shaft is pushed with base (5) put just under bearing shield, bearing shield will interfere with base and bearing shield can damage.
Do not put bases of hydraulic unit just under bearing shield (4).

s1.ptxt: Remove dust seal (1) from intermediate shaft bearing support using special tool.
Remove bearing support circlip (1) using snap ring pliers (2).
Using hydraulic press and special tool, remove intermediate shaft bearing from intermediate shaft bearing support (1) by pushing the bearing from transaxle side.
Remove deflector (1) and bearing shield from drive intermediate shaft using flat-bladed screwdriver or the like, if necessary.

Install new deflector (1) onto drive intermediate shaft, if removed, by tapping flat-surface of deflector indicated by arrow in figure, along the circle little by little and using flat-bladed screwdriver covered with cloth (2) to protect deflector from damage.

item.ptxt: Denting or scratching the oil seal contact surface of drive intermediate shaft will oil leakage.
Do not damage the contact surface when installing the deflector.
Incomplete installation of the deflector will damage the oil seal and result in oil leakage.
Confirm the deflector end (3) contacts with the shoulder (4) of the shaft evenly.

s1.ptxt: Install new bearing shield (1) to intermediate shaft using special tool, if removed.
Using hydraulic press and special tools, install new intermediate shaft bearing to intermediate shaft bearing support (1) by pushing the bearing from drive shaft side.
Install new circlip (1) in groove (2) of intermediate shaft bearing support.
Apply grease to space on bearing as shown in figure.
Install new dust seal (1) to the specified position on drive shaft side of intermediate shaft bearing support in specified direction shown in figure using special tools.
Press-fit drive intermediate shaft (2) into inner race (1) of intermediate shaft bearing from transaxle side using hydraulic press and special tool.
Install new circlip (1) to drive intermediate shaft.
